questions: Does Claude Fable 5 actually exist, and what are its verified facts (id, class, selection, fallback, ZDR)?
How does Fable 5 impact qor-logic's model-capability seam and the deferred adaptive-comms feature?

findings.detail: Fable 5 real, released 2026-06-09; multi-source (Anthropic/AWS/GitHub/CNBC). New 4th class Mythos. API id claude-fable-5.
model_pinning_lint.py:25 _CAPABILITY_ORDER lacks mythos; :36 _TIER_RE does not match claude-fable-5 -> Fable session is silently tier-invisible.

Fable auto-routes cyber+biology requests to Opus 4.8; qor-logic is security-heavy -> declared model != per-request responder on gate work. Enforcement must stay model-invariant; QOR_MODEL_FAMILY advisory only.
Fable requires 30-day retention; unavailable under ZDR -> adaptive layer must degrade to standard register.
